sessions.intent: Analyze PLang test coverage gaps and produce handoff document for tester/coder

before.assumptions: 23 existing test suites cover module actions. Engine-level behavior coverage unknown.
before.risk: Low — analysis only, no code changes

sessions.plan: Map all runtime2 modules and engine subsystems against existing .test.goal coverage. Identify gaps at module action and engine behavior levels. Write prioritized handoff document.

actions.context: Mapped all 16 modules (~60 actions) against 23 test suites to identify action-level gaps
Scanned all engine subsystems to understand full capability surface: execution pipeline, error handling, events, caching, actors, setup, context variables, channels, debug, test runner
Read all engine-level test files to understand depth of existing coverage
Wrote prioritized test gap handoff document with example PLang test code for each gap

after.health: Comprehensive gap analysis complete. Module coverage is reasonable. Engine-level gaps are significant: error handling, events, context variables, goal calls, caching, actors, setup.
after.notes: Step timeout and WaitForExecution exist in model but are not implemented. Builder validation designed on separate branch but not built.
